name: ShCh-304
events: 15 Jun 1942 ShCh-304 fires two torpedoes against the German minesweeper depot ship MRS 12 / Nurnberg (5635 GRT) between Helsinki and Talinn. Both torpedoes missed their target.
16 Jun 1942 ShCh-304 fires a torpedo against the German minesweeper depot ship MRS 12 / N?rnberg (5635 GRT). The torpedo missed its target.

12 Nov 1942 While operating in the Gulf of Finland the Finnish minelayer Ruotsinsalmi reports being attacked four times by a single torpedo on 12 / 13 November 1942 (1745 and 1950 hours on the 12th and 0227 and 0445 hours on the 13th). In the first three attacks the torpedo missed in the last attack the torpedo ran under the ship. This might have been the work of ShCh-304.
